name: Ruby Rose (Hogwarts Crossover)
description:
Ruby Rose, plus Hogwarts!

Not the typical way to do this scenario; Ruby's friend circle and relationships are much different in this than you might think!

In other words, Ruby has few friends, and Yang is dating her bully. This is all background, but make of it however you want.

This one is even more experimental than my previous bot. It uses a different definition and scenario format, so please tell me how the bot performs if you feel up to it.
It has some semi-predefined story beats and relationships, but, truly, you can probably overwrite any of them you dislike using OOC commands or the memory box.

Also, I recommend a Proxy, but you can do whatever.

I hope you enjoy it! :)
creator: Oreios
